items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail wallet. Gucci small leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud pattern fabric lining with GG details, inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill compartment.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Original Leather【New】GG Marmont Small Quilted Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain-link mini shoulder bag features a structured yet soft silhouette and a large flap closure with double-G metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options, allowing you to switch between shoulder and handbag styles. Features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, vintage gold metal hardware double-G, open interior pocket, adjustable chain shoulder strap (60 cm high). Also functions as a crossbody bag. Zip closure with extended pull, weight: approx. 0.394 kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Luce series mini shoulder bag. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this elegant mini shoulder bag with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable brown leather shoulder strap adds functionality. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, Gucci monogram zipper pull, interior: one flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (20cm high), twist lock closure, weight: approx. 0.25kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series small bamboo handbag. The Gucci Bamboo 1947 series handbags ingeniously incorporate unique designs such as handcrafted bamboo handles, buckles, and mirrors (encased in leather), showcasing the brand's classic style and exquisite craftsmanship. Visit designated stores or experience exclusive selection with the assistance of a client advisor. Red patent leather, gold-tone bamboo hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket; one open pocket with mirror, web strap length: 81-125cm; leather strap length: 99-111cm, bamboo handle (11cm high), web strap height: 41-64cm; leather strap height: 50-58cm, bamboo buckle closure, weight: approx. 0.9kg.

items.name_en: 💖Complete with original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Ophidia series blends Gucci's heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This wallet is crafted from grey and black GG Supreme canvas, accented with palladium-toned double G hardware, making the design even more eye-catching. Grey and black GG Supreme canvas, grey leather trim, palladium-toned double G hardware, removable wrist strap (13cm high), zip closure.

items.name_en: ❣️ Montaigne Avenue Bag
items.name_cn:
❣️ Montaigne Avenue Bag
This bag features an elegant design that elevates the classic series.
Exquisitely crafted from white patent leather, the rounded flap curves are refined, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather.
Accordion pleat design, spacious, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD buckle
Back Montaigne embossed logo
Adjustable chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather, with leather strap
Three compartments
Dimensions: 22
Model: 9261
